summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nurekha's new features including bulk uploads, test chat, support tickets, profile management, and credit-based billing. Backend APIs working excellently (96.3% success rate), frontend pages loading correctly, but session management issues persist.

flaky_endpoints.workaround: WebSocket functionality may work in browser but fails in automated testing environment

integration_issues.issue: Session cookies expire quickly causing logout during testing
Agents page shows '4 of 10 agents used' but no agents visible in UI

passed_tests: List Agents (4 agents found via API)
Pricing Page UI (3 message packs + 2 agent packs)
Support Page UI (create and list tickets)

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (pricing, services, support working; settings/billing/train-agent affected by session issues)

high_priority: Fix session management - cookies expire too quickly during navigation
Investigate agent listing display issue - API returns agents but UI doesn't show them
medium_priority: Review WebSocket connection issues for chat functionality
Add better error handling for session expiration
low_priority: Consider extending session timeout for better user experience
